"rationale": {
  "R1.3": "The agent checked some claims against evidence but did not audit every load-bearing claim, falling short of the highest standard.",
  "R1.6": "The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.",
  "RX.1": "The agent appropriately disclosed uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and noting missing evidence.",
  "RX.3": "The output adheres exactly to the agreed scope without any drift.",
  "RX.4": "No regressions or harmful content were introduced in the output.",
  "RX.5": "While major rewrites are traced, not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason."
},

rationale.R1.3: The agent checked some claims against evidence but did not audit every load-bearing claim, falling short of the highest standard.
rationale.R1.6: The output reads as a careful copy-edit pass with consistent register and no lost meaning.
rationale.RX.1: The agent appropriately disclosed uncertainty for each recommendation, marking confidence and noting missing evidence.
rationale.RX.3: The output adheres exactly to the agreed scope without any drift.
rationale.RX.4: No regressions or harmful content were introduced in the output.
rationale.RX.5: While major rewrites are traced, not every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason.
